title: Repair Box
description: Portable box where you can store "repair points" using minerals and then spend them to fix your items.
body:
Repair Box is a mod that adds a portable repair chest where you can store “repair points” using minerals, then spend them to fix your tools and weapons without consuming experience.

*** **Main Idea**   Load the box with materials (defined via config) that are consumed to create an internal repair pool.   Each point in the pool restores 1 point of durability for any damageable item placed inside. **Interface & Usage**   The box opens with its own GUI featuring dedicated slots: one for minerals and one for the item to repair.   It displays the current/max stored value and uses buttons to “charge” minerals into the pool or repair the selected item—no anvil or XP required. **Progression & Configuration**   Includes a maximum repair storage limit to keep balance.   The repair point values of each mineral are fully configurable via a file, allowing adaptation to different modpacks or difficulty levels. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1423828/description_a0dae0fb-8a0d-4b24-b693-5437cb4dbac8.png) ***

In-Game Configuration

The mod can be configured directly from within the game. A special button becomes visible only when the player is in Creative Mode. Clicking this button opens the configuration window, allowing easy editing without leaving the game.

***

Repair Box Interface

This window is highly intuitive. The player can view the listed materials along with their repair values, and also has a button to remove materials.

Below the materials panel, there is a slot to add any item that can be used in the Repair Box to repair equipment. Next to the item slot, a field allows you to set the repair amount, and beside it a button confirms the action.

***

Final Result View

After returning to the main item window, the player can clearly visualize the final result of the repair process. This provides immediate feedback on the applied materials and chosen repair values.

***
